title: NTILE window function returns incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE employees (dep VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, salary DOUBLE CHECK (salary > 0), hire_date DATE DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO employees (dep, name, salary, hire_date) VALUES ('mgmt', 'Smith', 81, DATE '2019-10-08');
INSERT INTO employees (dep, name, salary, hire_date) VALUES ('dev', 'Jones', 55, DATE '2019-08-09');
SELECT dep, name, salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY hire_date DESC) AS rank FROM employees;
SELECT dep, name, salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) AS rank FROM employees WHERE salary IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: NTILE window function with incorrect ordering of hire_date
